title: Simple Pancakes
steps: In a bowl combine flour, sugar, baking powder and salt.
Add milk and egg, whisk until smooth.
Heat a lightly buttered skillet over medium heat.
Pour batter to form pancakes. Cook until bubbles form, flip and cook until golden.
Serve with butter, honey or syrup.

title: Scrambled Eggs
steps: Crack eggs into a bowl, add a splash of milk (optional), salt and pepper. Beat well.
Heat butter in a non-stick pan over medium-low heat.
Pour eggs, let them set slightly then stir gently until curds form.
Remove from heat while still slightly soft, serve immediately.

title: Tomato Pasta
steps: Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a pan, heat olive oil and sauté minced garlic until fragrant.
Add chopped tomatoes, salt and pepper, simmer to make a simple sauce.
Toss cooked pasta in the sauce. Garnish with basil and serve.

title: Vegetable Stir Fry
steps: Heat oil in a wok or large pan over high heat.
Add garlic and stir until fragrant.
Add mixed vegetables and stir-fry until tender-crisp.
Add soy sauce, salt and pepper to taste. Serve with rice or noodles.
